headline: Is Axon Enterprise (AXON) Fairly Priced After Recent Public Safety Tech Momentum?
summary: Wondering if Axon Enterprise at around US$391 per share is offering value or asking you to pay up for its story is a fair place to start this valuation check. The stock is down 1.8% over the last week, 2.8% over the last month, 30.5% year to date and 47.9% over the past year, although it has gained 102.9% over three years and 176.4% over five years. Recent headlines around Axon have focused on its role in public safety technology and product adoption by law enforcement agencies, which helps...
